tests.name: StockService — classification logic should return both sufficient and at-risk materials
StockService — classification logic should classify material with stock well above thresholds as SUFFICIENT
StockService — classification logic should classify material below reorder point as NEARLY_OUT_OF_STOCK with REORDER_POINT_BREACH
StockService — classification logic should classify material below safety stock % as NEARLY_OUT_OF_STOCK with SAFETY_STOCK_PCT_BREACH
StockService — classification logic should classify material breaching both conditions as NEARLY_OUT_OF_STOCK with BOTH
StockService — classification logic should store and retrieve StockThresholdConfig
